bout which shell you are using is held in the SHELL environment variable. The command echo $SHELL or finger username displays the value of this variable. You can identify what your default shell is by looking at the last part of the pathname given by

looking at the last part of the pathname given by the above commands. sh: Bourne shell csh: C Shell tcsh: TC Shell ksh: Korn Shell bash: Bourne Again SHell Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance n
